title: pouteria austin-smithii
intro: Pouteria austin-smithii, also known as the West Indian satinwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria austin-smithii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Pouteria austin-smithii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine for its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain.
